calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Request For Court Judgment And Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-10-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: S.Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Jaime C. Couche, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Anderson and Poole.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Robab Vaziri-Tousi; Mohammad Vaziri-Tousi.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Defendant 1375 Sacramento Street, LLC not present in court.
Court ordered Defendants Does dismissed without prejudice.
Deidre Von Rock Ricci sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $13, 214.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $4,283.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $698.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $18,195.00

Judgment signed in open court.
